channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Thorny growth around tree needs cutting back please, 16th May
item.description:
Could this growth be treated with weed killer ? Thankyou x

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 105-107, Cotmandene Crescent, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter NEVER swept, 16th May
item.description:
Copperas street is ALWAYS full of litter. It has been for years and is not swept weekly as you claim. It need sweeping, gully cleaning and de-weeding.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harmony Place, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress dumped on pavement, 16th May
item.description:
Mattress dumped on pavement outside 111 Knollys Road - this is next to The Vale which is a building for the elderly where many of the residents use frames and mobility scooters

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Knollys Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street need to be cleaned, 16th May
item.description:
Street has not been cleaned for months. They are full of leaves, tree branches and litter everywhere

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sundridge Avenue, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree needs replacing, 16th May
item.description:
The Red Hawthorne tree, which was beautiful, has died. This year it has not grown any leaves and has not blossomed as it usually does. I noticed a lot of parakeets sitting in the tree feeding on the young buds and think they have killed it. Could it be replaced with something similar?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Avenue Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish at junction of Bury Road and Westbeech Road, 16th May
item.description:
Large bag of rubbish at junction of Buty Toad and Westbeech Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Whymark Avenue, Harringay, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Small gas Cannisters in box, 16th May
item.description:
Gas cannisters in box east pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Warwick Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: O/s 90 Brondesbury Villas, 16th May
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Corner of Alice St and Decima St, 16th May
item.description:
This bin problem still has not been addressed and continues to attract rubbish.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Decima Street, Walworth, Greater London

item.title: Abandoned Saintsmder bike, 16th May
item.description:
Outside no 261 Lewisham High Streer Please clear a Santander bike

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 261, Lewisham High Street, Hither Green, Greater London

item.title: White mdf / dismantled furniture / waste, 16th May
item.description:
It has been there 3 months and has not been removed by the refuse collection.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Copleston Road, Greater London

item.title: Rubbish in street, 16th May
item.description:
2 bins overflowing. On corner of cotesbach Road and cornthwaite road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cotesbach Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Barbecue loud music in West Hackney RecreationGround, 16th May
item.description:
Barbeque / sound system in West Hackney Recreation Ground. It’s a small area and unfair that people have to be inflicted with their music .
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Leswin Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garages on sandpiper way, 16th May
item.description:
There has been alot of fly rubbish and rubbish been left down by the garages on sandpiper way.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 45, Sandpiper Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin and rubbish strewn over pavement, 16th May
item.description:
Litter bin full, black bags ripped open and contents strewn about plus dumped mattress. Next to bus shelter.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westcombe Hill, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bedsprings reappeared, 16th May
item.description:
Bedsprings have reappeared on the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Balfour Street, Walworth, Greater London

item.title: Big pothole, 16th May
item.description:
Pothole

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): York Hill, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Edgington Way Sidcup, 16th May
item.description:
All the road signs along Edgington Way and onto Crittalls Corner roundabout are extremely dirty and could do with a clean but there is one sign, just past the Tesco entrance where the no U turn sign is rotated on its post and not visible to traffic.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Edgington Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Kerb Stone damaged, 16th May
item.description:
Kerb Stone is loose and a trip hazard as of Friday ca 6pm

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 88, Cowcross Street, Clerkenwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Breaking glass left on the lamp post, 16th May
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Hall Road, Crofton, Orpington, Greater London
